intro: Tripterospermum angustatum, commonly known as the Chinese pearl flower, is a plant species within the Gentianaceae family. This plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which may help to alleviate symptoms of fever, rheumatism, and skin infections. The bioactive constituents of Tripterospermum angustatum include iridoids, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. In traditional Chinese medicine, the plant is often used to make herbal preparations, such as decoctions and infusions, which are used to treat a range of health issues.
